phrases.intent_en: Ask where the self-portraits are displayed
phrases.text_local: Où sont exposés les autoportraits de Picasso ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn ex-poh-ZAY layz oh-toh-por-TREH duh pee-KAH-soh
phrases.cultural_note: The museum holds over 5,000 works from Picasso's personal collection, donated by his family as part of an inheritance settlement. The self-portraits offer a fascinating evolution across his different artistic periods.

responses.english: The self-portraits are on the second floor.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-toh-por-TREH sohn toh duh-ZYEM ay-TAHZH
responses.french: Les autoportraits sont au deuxième étage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the toilets are in the museum
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn lay twah-LET dahn luh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Toilets are usually in the basement or ground floor of Parisian museums.

responses.english: In the basement, at the bottom of the stairs.
responses.phonetic: oh soo-sol, ahn bah duh les-kah-lee-YAY
responses.french: Au sous-sol, en bas de l'escalier.

phrases.text_local: Vous avez un plan du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: vooz ah-VAY uhn plahn doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Free museum maps are usually available at the front desk or ticket counter.

responses.english: Yes, there are some at the reception.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn ah ah lah-KUH-ee
responses.french: Oui, il y en a à l'accueil.

phrases.text_local: Deux billets adultes, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: duh bee-YEH ah-DOOLT, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Admission is free for visitors under 18 and for EU residents under 26. The museum is closed on Mondays. The courtyard café is a pleasant spot to rest after the visit.

responses.english: Two adult tickets, that is twenty-eight euros.
responses.phonetic: duh bee-YAY ah-DOOLT, sah feh vant-weet uh-ROH
responses.french: Deux billets adulte, ça fait vingt-huit euros.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a guided tour in English
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des visites guidées en anglais aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day vee-ZEET gee-DAY ahn ahn-GLEH oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours in English are offered on select days. Check the museum's weekly schedule at the entrance. The audio guide is a reliable alternative and covers the key works in depth.

responses.english: Yes, there is a guided tour in English on Saturdays at two.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah oon vee-ZEET gee-DAY ahn ahn-GLEH luh sahm-DEE ah kah-TORZ uhr
responses.french: Oui, il y a une visite guidée en anglais le samedi à quatorze heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la boutique du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah boo-TEEK doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop has an excellent selection of art books, prints, and Picasso-inspired gifts. It's accessible without a museum ticket — worth browsing even if you've already visited.

responses.english: The shop is on the ground floor, near the exit.
responses.phonetic: lah boo-TEEK eh toh ray-duh-shoh-SAY, preh duh lah sor-TEE
responses.french: La boutique est au rez-de-chaussée, près de la sortie.
